utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified according to the required details: health_coverage includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with coverage elements and an implicit cost through integration; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details and coverage costs/limits; additional_services lists enhancement services with associated fees; total_budget provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected 'Balanced Global Family Protection3' as the primary integrated plan, bundling health, property, and travel coverage. This name does not appear in the ground-truth ratings, but its features (global coverage, preventive and mental health, telemedicine, property, and travel integration) most closely align with the highest-rated premium options: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel). The additional services such as concierge, dedicated agent, priority claims, and premium medical network match the 'Premium Insurance Membership' and 'Premium Medical Network' add-ons in the ground-truth data. Therefore, we map the integrated plan components to the corresponding top-rated options.
